prompt:
Men's variation — a photorealistic 1:1 lifestyle photograph: a fit warm-skinned man in his early 30s sitting on the edge of a sun-warmed wood patio table outdoors mid-afternoon, one leg loosely up, casually leaning forward. He lifts ONE dark sugar-dusted sea moss gummy CUBE between his thumb and index finger toward his slightly parted lips with a relaxed half-smile, mid-bite. He wears a fitted heather sage tee, dark cotton shorts, simple leather watch, sun-warmed glowing skin, light stubble.

DIRECT NATURAL SUNLIGHT (slightly dappled from leaves overhead) FALLS DIRECTLY on the JAR sitting on the wood patio table beside him — the sunlight visibly illuminates the jar's front label, catching the teal/cyan and yellow accents and grazing the curved black plastic with a bright rim-light. Dappled light spots scatter across the jar and the wood table around it. Beside the jar sits a small ceramic dish holding 5-6 more sugar-dusted gummy CUBES, also catching the sunlight. The jar must match the provided reference image — black plastic jar with teal/cyan and yellow accents, front label reading 'DIALED SEA MOSS Gummies, TASTY · CONVENIENT · EFFECTIVE, 60 GUMMIES, DIETARY SUPPLEMENT', side panel 'MsB° Mineral Support Blend' in vertical teal strip, lid off, fully legible.

Background: a softly out-of-focus backyard / garden — green foliage, a hint of a wooden fence, golden afternoon sunlight filtering through leaves. Warm depth.

Lighting: bright direct outdoor natural sunlight falling on BOTH the jar AND the man — the same dappled tree-light wraps the entire scene, integrating subject and product. Color grade is warm, slightly saturated, editorial men's wellness-brand feel (Hims / Athletic Greens / Roman).

Framing: square 1:1, three-quarter view of the man, gummy held in the upper-third near his face, jar prominent in the lower-third on the table with direct sunlight on its label. Subject and product both clearly recognizable.

Style: hyper-realistic photography, 50mm look, f/2.2 shallow depth, natural unretouched skin texture and stubble, no AI artifacts, no extra fingers.
